driver_insight: Howrah's human apparent temperature of 46.4°C is primarily driven by high building density (NDBI 0.61), low vegetation cover (NDVI 0.08), low-albedo surface materials (albedo 0.12), high humidity (62.2%) exacerbating heat stress. Based on our dual AIML modeling, the city's heat dynamics are captured with high accuracy (Linear R² = 1.0, Random Forest R² = 0.991). In this city, every 0.1 increase in NDVI is associated with a 2.08°C change in LST.
